docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 19TH AUTOBODY CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF 19TH AUTOBODY CENTER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CLIFFORD BUTTERFIELD JR.. DEFENDANT SHERLYNN THURMAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 19TH AUTOBODY CENTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THURMAN, SHERLYNN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-25-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THURMAN, SHERLYNN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,150.00 FILED BY 19TH AUTOBODY CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT THURMAN, SHERLYNN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF 19TH AUTOBODY CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT THURMAN, SHERLYNN
